subject: Run DB script before starting other containers
commit_message:
Run DB script before starting other containers

The other containers were starting before their user names had
been added to the DB.  Consequently, they were aborting at start-up.
Modified the various setup.sh scripts to run the DB-init script
before starting the remaing containers.
Also add start_all to start the containers and wait for the ports
to start listening, eliminating the need for the "curl" tests in
the setup.sh scripts.
Also removed version numbers from some yml files.

Change-Id: Idd9ff81b3ab4a78926b644f22360c9222afe82d5
Issue-ID: POLICY-1829
Signed-off-by: Jim Hahn <jrh3@att.com>

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> (1 comment)

Yes - the dublin branch of CSIT should be pulling ONLY the Dublin version of the images. The master branch of CSIT should be pulling ONLY master versions. In addition, the Dublin branch CSIT should checkout the dublin branch for any CLONE's being done. I didn't see any here but I'm concerned there might be some.

Patch Set 1:

> > Patch Set 1:
 > >
 > > (1 comment)
 > 
 > Yes - the dublin branch of CSIT should be pulling ONLY the Dublin
 > version of the images. The master branch of CSIT should be pulling
 > ONLY master versions. In addition, the Dublin branch CSIT should
 > checkout the dublin branch for any CLONE's being done. I didn't see
 > any here but I'm concerned there might be some.

I tested some of the dublin snapshot versions in my local VM, and those worked, using the versions from https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Policy+Framework+Project%3A+Component+Versions.  However, I wasn't able to pull the snapshot version of apex; had to pull the release version instead.
Good point about the clones.  I know a couple of the setup.sh scripts clone the dmaap-sim, and a couple clone the various repos (e.g., I think healthcheck clones drools-pdp and several others).  These could probably be re-written to just use the pre-built docker images.
